prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Terminations & splices, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: wrong wirenut size. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: NEC 110.14.
title: Tool and material selection: Terminations & splices (service call)
